overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a black coat exploring the interior of a rustic wooden cottage. The character moves steadily through a cozy living space featuring a fireplace, bookshelves, and vintage furnishings, with atmospheric lighting from windows and interior lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry hall with fireplace and wooden stairs

agents.ego_description: character in black coat walking from the stairway area toward the bookshelves

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with worn steps leading upward
black cast iron wood-burning stove with visible fire inside
tall ornate ceramic vase on wooden table
tall dark wooden bookshelf filled with books and arched top design
stack of chopped firewood next to the stove
large patterned red and beige area rug covering the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in the entry area of a rustic cottage, with a wooden staircase to the left and a cast iron stove providing warm light. The character walks forward across an oriental rug toward a large wooden bookshelf, passing a decorative vase and stack of firewood.

scene_state.functional_zone: living area with seating and reading nook

events.description: passing the green banker's lamp on the side table, increasing warm light on the right

agents.ego_description: character walking past the bookshelves toward the armchair and window area

entered.detail: upholstered wicker armchair with cream cushions near the window
classic green glass banker's lamp on small wooden side table
window with blue curtains allowing diffused daylight to enter
rectangular wall clock with red frame hanging from the ceiling beam
sloped ceiling with exposed wooden beams and thatched roofing material

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the main living area, passing the tall bookshelves which recede to the left and exit view. A cozy seating area with a wicker armchair and illuminated green lamp comes into view near a curtained window. The thatched ceiling and wooden beams are prominently visible overhead as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage area with shelves and exit

events.description: character slows slightly while approaching the closed wooden door at the corridor end

agents.ego_description: character walking through the storage area toward the exit door at the end of the room

entered.detail: open wooden shelving unit with various pots and containers
wicker baskets and colorful fabric bundles stacked on the floor
heavy wooden panel door with iron handle at the end of the corridor
wooden stand with hanging garments and hats
rectangular mirror with ornate frame mounted on the wall
small multi-paned window with blue curtains

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character moving through a storage area with open shelving and wicker baskets. The armchair and lamp recede behind as the character approaches a heavy wooden door at the end of the room. A coat rack and wall mirror become visible on the right as the character nears the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the interior of a rustic cottage, transitioning from a warm entryway into a cozy living space and finally toward a storage exit. It begins in the entry area, moving past a wooden staircase and a glowing cast iron stove across an oriental rug toward a large bookshelf. As the character advances, the bookshelves recede to the left to reveal a main living area featuring a wicker armchair and an illuminated green lamp beneath a thatched ceiling with heavy wooden beams. The scene then shifts into a storage area filled with open shelving and wicker baskets, leaving the seating area behind. Finally, the camera passes a coat rack and wall mirror while approaching a heavy wooden door at the end of the room.
